title: Repository Baseline, Go 1.26 Toolchain, Modules, and Reproduction · Independent Go Trial

steps.title: Pokedex product engineering and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Pokedex Go Repository State
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab Go team handles case 1257 during a clean cross-platform package smoke. Build deterministic Go evidence to reconcile Go toolchain, module, clean-build, target, and dependency evidence; the release claim must identify the exact source and artifact revision; then inject one redirect, control sequence, file, timeout, or persistence failure and reject it safely. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original fixtures only. Real PokéAPI traffic, DNS, sockets, TLS, host files, terminals, signals, race and leak claims, load, cross-platform packaging, accessibility review, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Inspect revision, branch, worktree, ignored files, configuration, tests, fixtures, secrets, licenses, and recovery anchor before editing.
